entry.title: Re: For an in-depth look at clean core and how to implement it, read our Clean Core Extensibility pa
entry.content:
In addition to the content I find it useful to consider the "SAP Application Extension Methodology".
A structured way to handle and govern extensions.

Please take a look on it:

https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-btp-guidance-framework/sap-application-extension-methodology

entry.title: SAP Standard Possibility for a huge number of single posting documents in Accounts receivables
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

could you provide some hints/recommendations how to deal with a very huge number of single Fi documents with small amounts from private customers. Currently we are dealing with them mostly on CPD customer accounts in FI-AR, but I assume that there might be a better standard solution from SAP in order to deal with it.

Thank you

entry.title: seek an answer.
entry.content: What technical and business processchanges should be noted when upgradingfrom SAP ECC 6.0 to S/4HANA 2021?

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA integration with SAP Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh
entry.content:
Hi @RajeshY ,

You can also refer to SAP Note 3465958  for troubleshooting purpose.

entry.title: Re: SWNCONFIG works but still no Email were send
entry.content:
Hello @aboooood 

Check the log of SWN_SELSEN run. You can find it in SWNCONFIG:

A probable cause are inactive web services - see the note 1833910 - HTTP Error 403 or 404 when running SWN_SELSEN (Extended Notifications)

Also notice that a typical delivery schedule is every 15 mins. So you need to wait between subsequents runs of SWN_SELSEN.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Does RSTRAN table exist in BW Bridge?
entry.content:
Hi@Alok6681 ,

tables like RSDS, RSTRAN exist, you can check them in ABAP project of BW Bridge. But it is not possible to view their contents as they are not released by SAP, hence you will get "not authorized" error.

Partially required information can be found in BW Bridge Cockpit, like count of ADSOs or Infoobjects, but not everything.

A solution could be to raise an incident to SAP, asking to release necessary tables.

entry.title: Document Type doesn't exist in Layout and Sequence window's list for Crystal Report Layout
entry.content:
Hello experts.

I have created a crystal report layout for my SAP B1 A/R correction invoices and imported it on the system.

In my 'Report and Layout manager', code 'CSI4' is set for A/R correction invoices' layouts.

Then, when I open an already existing correction invoice and click on 'Preview' to view the report, I get these error messages:

No matching records found 'Document Type List' (RTYP) (ODBC -2028) [Message 131-183]
No matching records found 'Document' (RDOC) (ODBC -2028) [Message 131-183]

When I click on 'Layout designer' and the 'Layout and Sequence window' opens, the 'Document Type' is automatically set as 'CSI2' in the dropdown list. However when I open the list, CSI2 doesn't exist in it + when I checked RTYP table(Document Type List), there's no 'CSI2' code defined, it only has CSI3 and CSI4.

I have also noticed that I can't even see SAP's own PLD layout for correction invoices. The same error messages appear when I set it as my default layout and click preview so I guess there's nothing wrong with my Crystal report and the problem lies somewhere else.

I'm new to SAP B1 and I'd really appreciate any help.

entry.title: Re: Fiori Launchpad: Display Background Send Mail Workflow Task with Decision Step in My Inbox and N
entry.content: Thanks for this informative topic, i still have one major issue though, in my workflow i am sending multiple send mail steps on a loop, if the step is made not background and requiring to confirm end of processing that will make the workflow wait until each work item is completed before sending the next notification which is a show stopper, since this is a notification and there is nothing for the user to do, the workflow should not be blocked waiting for it

entry.title: Re: Is there an option to Search emails from shared mailb...
entry.content:
If you register the external authentication with the shared emailadress, you can access the mails via selecting an other authentication. 

We've had the same issue before and solved it by creating 6 external authentications, each registered with the emailadress that we needed to read, and then reading out all the mailboxes one by one by selecting a different authentication. A bit of a workaround, but it works.

entry.title: Incoterm Location 1 - Can it remain empty in BP masterdata and sales order?
entry.content:
Hi all,

there are some questions regarding the incoterms and the error handling. 

When the incoterms ID (like "EXW") are maintained in the BP master data, there is an error occurring which tells me to fill the incoterms location. In customizing, there is no way to change this error handling. Also for sales orders - in the incompleteness procedure I can only set the incoterm ID, but not especially the field "incoterms location". 

Is there any chance that the incoterms ID can be used without the field "incoterms location"? 

Thanks and best regards

Katja

entry.title: Re: Creating OData Services with CDS using SADL and Annotation.
entry.content:
Hi, both went really well, thank you! I now want to go one step further and generate a Fiori app from the odata. When I select a template via the BAS and connect to the system, I can see almost all the services in the selection. Unfortunately, only the two created in this way do not. Is this an error, or are there other conditions for a service to be displayed in this list?

I would be very happy to receive an answer!

entry.title: Re: Can we use open source libraries with RAP or CAP ?
entry.content:
HI @WouterLemaire ,thanks for your reply

I want an open source library for document editor not image . 

also i want to process the file after the change from the editor , like replace {fullname} with real data from selected employee . 

If you know any open source library to do that . 

Also its easy to add any library to RAP or CAP ? 

I think i can do it in rap when i make a project from Vscode from RAP ODATA  , right ?

entry.title: Re: ABAP INSERT and SUBMIT REPORT --> Catch SYNTAX_ERROR
entry.content:
Hi,
try to use 'cl_abap_typedescr=>describe_by_name( )'
and 'CATCH cx_sy_rtti_syntax_error'.

entry.title: Re: How to extract data from BPC generated ADSO to BW sta...
entry.content: Activate the "Use as Source of data" checkbox from the BPC model setting. This will generate the BADI provider for the model. Next you can create a Composite provider and include the BADI provider into it. Now you can create transformation from the Compsite provider to the BW ADSO to which you want to load the data.

entry.title: Re: Funds Reservation used in term of Earmarked Funds (Fund Management)
entry.content:
Hi Anil,

 

Yes , earmarked can be used in PR,PO & MIRO as well, It will also store data in earmarked consumption history.

entry.content:
Hi,

sorry, this explains nothing.

I'm doing my first steps in BAS, just a few days, and I have a mess 5 workspaces. I don't know how it comes so far. I don't know how I have created them. I don't know how to get from one to another, it just happens randomly. I don't know how to delete them.

Tom

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM core capabilities that supports the adoption of clean core
entry.content: @Ajay88 still no  QG4 workbook/checklist?!

entry.title: Re: SWNCONFIG works but still no Email were send
entry.content: Hello Dominik, i checked the logs its in the Bild6 attached to the question every thing is fine but still no Email send. i tried to change Recipient Address i used to put my Email then changed it to * and now im getting error 403.

entry.title: Activated flexible workflow in the system
entry.content:
1)As we have activated flexible workflow in system for all valid work items (purchase requisition/purchase order/contracts/scheduling agreement and if it gets approved from all level, then also the system is open, and the creator is able to make any changes in the purchase order (fully approved).Even the work item if in the release process then also the creator is able to make any changes in the work item. 

2)Also please let us know once if user has accepted the purchase order then is there any option where he can de-release the purchase order. 

3)For suppose if we reject any work-item then it goes to the creator of the work-item, in all cases it should be restarted but the work-item is getting restarted for only those conditions which are mentioned in the standard conditions for restart to trigger. But what if there is any other condition in which user will have to change the PO how restart will retrigger for completion of workflow. 

4)Do we need to configure all manage workflow templates in all the client we are moving or is there any option where we can export import workflow templates within different systems/client. 

5)Is there any mass option available for uploading flexible workflow templates in system as there is huge DOA available to upload with different combinations. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Activated flexible workflow in the system
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

To answer your queries: 

Please be aware each document might behave slightly different, so to ensure consistency I have answered for Purchase Orders below. To check for Purchase Requisitions/Contracts etc, please review the associated help documentation for that document:

1)As we have activated flexible workflow in system for all valid work items (purchase requisition/purchase order/contracts/scheduling agreement and if it gets approved from all level, then also the system is open, and the creator is able to make any changes in the purchase order (fully approved).Even the work item if in the release process then also the creator is able to make any changes in the work item. 

Edit of a document is possible depending on the status of the document. This is explained further here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/af9ef57f504840d2b81be8667206d485/ecc316567879bf45e10000000a4450e5-661.html?locale=en-US#editing-an-existing-purchase-order

2)Also please let us know once if user has accepted the purchase order then is there any option where he can de-release the purchase order. 

There is no de-release option when a document has been fully approved. The document can be rejected or approved. There is the option to 'Withdraw from Approval' when the document is In Approval status. This does not de-release, it simply takes the document out of approval to allow edit. This is explained in the above link as well.

3)For suppose if we reject any work-item then it goes to the creator of the work-item, in all cases it should be restarted but the work-item is getting restarted for only those conditions which are mentioned in the standard conditions for restart to trigger. But what if there is any other condition in which user will have to change the PO how restart will retrigger for completion of workflow. 

The restart of flexible workflow is explained here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/af9ef57f504840d2b81be8667206d485/46c9e5b6ba7a4feeb920ca1cbad68c73.html?locale=en-US

Where it states: 

  • The configuration step Manage Conditions to Restart Flexible Workflow is available to manage conditions that retriggers the approval workflow for purchase orders. You can configure this step using the app Manage Your Solutions . Go to the configuration step Configure Your Solution  Sourcing and Procurement  Operational Procurement  Purchase Order Processing  Manage Conditions to Restart Flexible Workflow in the app Manage Your Solutions.
  • To decide which critical changes lead to restart, you can create an implementation for the custom logic Define Conditions to Restart Flexible Workflow in Purchase Orders in the app Custom Fields and Logic.

Please also review here: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/which-fields-are-relevant-for-the-restart-of-flexible-workflow-in-purchase/ba-p/12836637

4)Do we need to configure all manage workflow templates in all the client we are moving or is there any option where we can export import workflow templates within different systems/client. 

In relation to exporting workflow templates, please review here: https://help.sap.com/docs/ABAP_PLATFORM_NEW/b5670aaaa2364a29935f40b16499972d/647ec99192b249659b4e6f00a27d925e.html?locale=en-US

5)Is there any mass option available for uploading flexible workflow templates in system as there is huge DOA available to upload with different combinations. 

Please review above documentation. 

I hope this helps answer and provide the links where you need to review to understand the functionality available. 

Kind Regards, 
Lisa 
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: 🟢 Building partner products on SAP BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content: When will the Publish Product app and the possibility for partners to create an add on be available in the Landscape Portal?

entry.title: Re: Error : Production Order change status : CLOSE
entry.content:
Hello,

Check if there is TransactionNotification or PostTransaction running in ProductionOrder, if you have, disabled them and disabled all the addons too. Then try again.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Azure Cloud Hotfolder not fetching data with WSL
entry.content: Strangely, I could not get the logs you shared in your question even if I open DEBUG level logging. I see that junit is enabled in your local, can you try disabling it by setting installed.tenants as empty and restart the server?

entry.title: Re: Can't preview Crystal Report Layout for A/R correction invoices
entry.content:
Hello,

Are you logged in with the manager account? It seems to me theres something to do with authorization.

Best regards

Pranav Garud

entry.title: Re: Azure Cloud Hotfolder not fetching data with WSL
entry.content:
The logs in the question were enabled using these properties:

log4j2.logger.azure.name = de.hybris.platform.cloud.azure.hotfolder
log4j2.logger.azure.level = DEBUG
log4j2.logger.azure.appenderRef.stdout.ref = STDOUT
log4j2.logger.cloud.name = de.hybris.platform.cloud.hotfolder
log4j2.logger.cloud.level = DEBUG
log4j2.logger.cloud.appenderRef.stdout.ref = STDOUT
log4j2.logger.cloudcommons.name = de.hybris.platform.cloud.commons
log4j2.logger.cloudcommons.level = DEBUG
log4j2.logger.cloudcommons.appenderRef.stdout.ref = STDOUT

when i execute "npm start"

app works perfectly in deployed version. struggles with local execution .

Thanks in advance for your time.

entry.title: Re: Azure Cloud Hotfolder not fetching data with WSL
entry.content: I removed any tenant from installed.tenants and application started without errors, but i'm still not able to see any logs, I also tried with this kba https://me.sap.com/notes/3506703/E but the group id seems correct

entry.title: Increase in Non Completions for online Learning items in LMS
entry.content:
Hi

 

Are any users noticing an increase of users reports non completions in LMS when doing online learning items. Since more and more of our staff Work From Home we are finding that about 10% of users report that after they have completed a learning online item the system is not recording the progress or not marking it as complete. 

 

I realise this could be down to a number of variables but its becoming a real problem for us

 

Thanks

entry.title: Customer Ageing Query in Hana for SAP B1
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm trying to write a customer ageing query in SAP B1 Hana,

Here's what I have (lifted from SQL and converted):

It's getting stuck on the 'WHERE' in the IFNull lines if anyone can offer some assistance please?

SELECT
T1."CardCode", T1."CardName", T1."CreditLine", T0."RefDate", T0."Ref1" AS "Document Number",
CASE
WHEN T0."TransType" = 13 THEN 'Invoice'
WHEN T0."TransType" = 14 THEN 'Credit Note'
WHEN T0."TransType" = 30 THEN 'Journal'
WHEN T0."TransType" = 24 THEN 'Receipt'
END AS "Document Type",

T0."DueDate",
(T0."Debit" - T0."Credit") AS "Balance",

IFNULL((SELECT T0."Debit" - T0."Credit" WHERE DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') <= -1), 0) AS "Future",
IFNULL((SELECT T0."Debit" - T0."Credit" WHERE DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') >= 0 AND DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') <= 30), 0) AS "Current",
IFNULL((SELECT T0."Debit" - T0."Credit" WHERE DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') > 30 AND DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') <= 60), 0) AS "31-60 Days",
IFNULL((SELECT T0."Debit" - T0."Credit" WHERE DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') > 60 AND DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') <= 90), 0) AS "61-90 Days",
IFNULL((SELECT T0."Debit" - T0."Credit" WHERE DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') > 90 AND DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') <= 120), 0) AS "91-120 Days",
IFNULL((SELECT T0."Debit" - T0."Credit" WHERE DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') >= 121), 0) AS "121+ Days"

FROM "JDT1" T0
INNER JOIN "OCRD" T1 ON T0."ShortName" = T1."CardCode"

Regards

Vladimir Kogan

entry.title: SEND NOTIFICATIOS/ ALERTS BETWEEN USERS IN S4 HANA CLOUD PUBLIC
entry.content:
Hello,

I as a SAP user (A) want to send messages in notification or alert mode to another SAP user (B), is there any way to do it?

In SAP R3, for example, we can send message type pop-up. It would be something similar.

Is there such an option?

Thanks in advance.

Best regards,

Ismael.

entry.title: Re: What you need to get and stay certified
entry.content:
Hi @Marm 

If you are referring to assessments – they are unlimited attempts.
So there are only 3 attempts for the exam, but if you have passed the exam and have to do the stay certified assessment to extend the certification you have unlimited attempts.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Managed_UUID vs Managed_Semantic
entry.content: There is a new link for this topic at SAP Help: https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/numbering

entry.title: VA03-Incompletion log-WBS element data missing.
entry.content:
Hi,

I am getting input values from IDOC to create sales order. The requirement is to add WBS Element into the sales order based on the input from the IDOC. I have maintained a custom table to solve this requirement. The wbs element is fetched and updated to the sales order item through MV45AFZZ. The wbs element is getting displayed in the va03 screen and also in vbap table. But, the incompletion log is showing that wbs element is missing. Even when I try to expand the incompletion log, the wbs element is visible. This looks like a strange issue, and if anyone know the solution, Kindly help with this.

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Teaching Enterprise Architecture with Real-World Relevance
entry.content:
I find Dr.Kotusev's CSVLOD model more realistic and applies better in SAP-centric world. I wish SAP EA should have been designed as TOGAF+Kotusev mix rather than the existing diluted version of TOGAF alone. Even though TOGAF has managed to become a kind of lingua franca in EA world, the emphasis on Governance in TOGAF is steered towards C-suite executives as audiences. Dr.Kotusev makes a lot of sense in that context where he tries to bring evidence based reasoning to EA.
My opinion is that,I would like to think TOGAF as a way of standardising language and terminology but implementation plans should be based on CVSLOD and working through the Essential artefacts.

entry.title: SAP Build Publishing Public Link
entry.content:
Greetings,

I deployed an app in SAP Build and found the link under "HTML5 Applications." However, the link is not publicly accessible—it requires company credentials for access.

Can someone guide me on how to remove this restriction and make the link publicly accessible without requiring any specific credentials?

entry.title: Re: CF Deployment Error: Error getting tenant t0
entry.content: Hi, has this problem being solved as I am having the same with CDS 8.6.1. etc ?

entry.title: Re: Manage / start XBP jobs using REST interface
entry.content:
"ABAP Connectivity" will not know the answer to this question, it is to specific. You will need to ask the team that is responsible for job scheduling and the XBP function modules.

I didn't find a matching tag for that topic, but the OSS component is
BC-CCM-API-CSI-XMI

Perhaps a SAP ticket on that component will provide an answer. (In any case, the answer needs to come from that team directly, because nobody else can speak in their name and provide details about their development schedule and release planning.)

entry.title: Re: Create Supplier along with attahments in S4System fro...

entry.title: Service and Asset Manager Mobile Solution Feedback
entry.content:
Hi,

I am looking for some feedback on best practices for an SAP Service and Asset Manager Mobile Solution implementation.

We would appreciate any feedback you can provide on your experience to the following questions (and anything else you would be willing to share):

  1. How long did it take to implement the solution?
  2. Which version/release did you implement
  3. Did you use a partner or internal resources (for entire implementation or for various phases; e.g. project management, system setup, configuration, training)?
  4. Any Lessons learned?

We have a relatively small footprint and only looking to implement at 2 plants.

Thanks in advance,

Bob

entry.title: Re: Create Supplier along with attahments in S4System fro...
entry.content: Hi Anirban, which API can I call from other system to create the supplier with an attachment?

entry.title: Why do we need to integrate SAP public cloud asset management with asset central foundation?
entry.content:
We are done with baseline configuration of asset management. There is one node which is marked as mandatory "set up integration with asset central foundation". We opened the guide document which is attached with this node and while reviewing the document we found out that it is for integration between S/4 HANA cloud private edition and asset central foundation.

We need clarity on these points:
1. Is it really necessary to perform this integration while implementing S/4 HANA cloud public edition?
2. How can we perform this integration and what are the issues we will face if we choose not to integrate our system with asset central foundation?

entry.title: Trade Compliance and Customs Process with SAP Transportation Management for Shippers in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Global Trade is a very vast topic. With this SAP blog post I want to narrow down and focuses on very specific use case which is of a Shipper using SAP Transportation Management system to ship goods internationally. Shipper may use foreign-trade compliant SAP Global Trade Services (SAP GTS) solution or any other non-SAP solution.

Standard product documentation:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_GLOBAL_TRADE_SERVICES_EDITION_HANA/3e27235faf0442d380b529b89bb82982/4a9eb3af0c5b388fe10000000a42189c.html?locale=en-US

Compliance Management Control: Compliance Management helps ensure your compliance with international trade regulations. Compliance Management helps you rationalize your extended logistics chain and automate the complicated processes that are involved with international trade compliance issues, a primary prerequisite for successful international trading activities. This minimizes the risk of having to pay penalties and fines. 

  1. Sanction Party List Screening check: Sanctioned Party involved in the Transportation (Shipper, Consignee, Carrier etc.). A sanctioned party list contains a list of persons and companies with whom trade is prohibited by law. Sanctioned party lists are issued by government agencies and can be obtained from data providers. Sanctioned party lists are binding for all traders. During sanctioned party list screening, you compare your business partner addresses with the addresses on the relevant sanctioned party lists. When you export goods, for example, you can automatically compare the consignees' addresses with the sanctioned party list.
  2. Legal Control check: Legal control includes checking business transactions for products that require licenses, as well as the check for embargo situations for these business transactions.
    • Managing Licenses: The authorities define bans and restrictions for individual products or product groups to control their import and/or export. To import and export these products despite such restrictions, you can apply for licenses from the authorities. These licenses restrict goods traffic, for example, through quantity quotas or maximum values for goods. The authorities define license requirements for products based on import/export control classification numbers, with which you classify your products. Based on this classification, the system can detect which document items in a business transaction require licenses.
    • Embargo Checks: The government agencies of a country, group of countries, or international organizations as representatives of the United Nations sometimes impose bans on shipping specific products to specific countries, for business or political reasons, known as embargos. You have to comply with these embargos in your import and export processes.

Customs Management Control: The system helps your company automate and standardize import and export processes with the customs authorities. This enables you to use the import and export of goods faster and reduce the total costs for handling customs-relevant transactions. One essential prerequisite for this is electronic communication with the customs authorities in the individual countries that use computerized procedures. Electronic customs processing with the application helps companies meet the stringent requirements of the legal regulations, accelerating the release of their goods by the customs authorities.

Relevant information like shipment route, packaged cargo details, involved countries, Customs Invoice etc. is needed to file the Export/Import Declaration and receive a confirmation and Customs Reference Numbers.

From a point of view of SAP Transportation Management solution the Trade Compliance and Customs check functionality is embedded in the transport documents. APIs in the form of Service interfaces are provided from SAP TM to integrate SAP Global Trade Services (SAP GTS)

For Trade Compliance Check:

  • TradeComplianceCheckSUITERequest_Out
  • TradeComplianceCheckSUITEConfirmation_In

Further information on setup and process can be found in the product help

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/e3dc5400c1cc41d1bc0ae0e7fd9aa5a2/973af566a5eb481da5161fcc7f118ca9.html?locale=en-US

For Customs process:

  • ExportDeclarationSUITERequest_Out
  • ExportDeclarationSUITEConfirmation_In

Further information on setup and process can be found in the product help

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/e3dc5400c1cc41d1bc0ae0e7fd9aa5a2/9eaf60c26c9b4067acddf492d8aa9376.html?locale=en-US

Freight Unit being the representation of Cargo being transported is near to the Compliance Management function with clear status for Embargo, Legal Control and Sanctioned Party Screening, for each material shipped. Checks are performed during creation and any relevant change to the freight unit data to always stay compliant. Also, once the “shipment” or what we call as a Freight Order is created with additional logistical information and Carrier involved, compliance check is also performed to stay compliant before the start of execution.

Customs Management (receiving export declaration confirmation etc.) is more on the “shipment” level or Freight Order Level. Before filing for customs declaration certain information like shipment route, packaged cargo, involved countries, Customs Invoice etc. is needed. Most of this information is already available in the Freight Order, customs invoice can be requested from the Freight Order.

Specific Customs and Compliance status are made visible in the Freight Order and execution blocks are enforced until the shipment has all the necessary required approvals in place.

Happy reading !!!

entry.title: Text/Association missing in the Text tables of sap datasphere
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Problem:

All the Text tables created by Import Entities option are missing the “Text/Association”.

For example, Cost Center Text table is created as seen in the screenshot below with the warning -
Text entity "Remote.SAP_S4H_XXX_XXX.I_CostCenterText" does not have exactly one key attribute with a "Text / Association" set. This attribute must not have any semantic type and must be the representative key, if one is defined.

SAP has not given authorizations to make changes in the table. So it does not allow me to update the Text/Association.

How can this be fixed? Could you please suggest.

entry.title: SAP CAP Lessons Learned: SQLite is single threaded, HANA is not
entry.content:
Good day fellow CAPpers,

Today I'll share one of the lessons I've learned working with CAP, something that may not be clear in the current tutorials or documentation. When running locally, in a development environment, you usually would choose SQLite. Then on hybrid or production environment you switch to a HANA database.

It happens that you won't be able to simulate the production behavior locally. SQLite is single threaded, and locks the database as one is writing on it.

Suppose you have a code that has 2 functions:

  1. fetch(): Fetches data from an external system and INSERTs in a local table
  2. print(): Prints the last fetched record

And the following data that will be fetched: first, second, third, fourth...

This is what happens if you call three times fetch() then three times print():

  • SQLite: third, third, third
  • HANA*: first, second, third
    • *the actual result may vary according to the time it takes to fetch the data. On the worst case scenario (slowest), it would return: undefined, undefined, undefined 

SQLite will execute database calls in the order they were called to prevent data corruption (even if the calls are in different entities, thus safe), whereas HANA is able to handle concurrent calls.

 

To tell the truth, I'm not sure how's the behavior in Postgres. If you have experience with it, please comment below and share with us.

 

May this post help you on your troubleshooting. Reply if you find any issues so I, and the community, can help.

Lucas Magrini Rigo

entry.title: Issue with UTCTOLOCAL Function in Data Flows (SAP Datasphere)
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I am encountering an issue while working on a calculated column (CD_SNAPSHOT_DATE) in Data Flows in SAP Datasphere.

We have  calculated columns in a Fact View to derive the current date using the following expression:

TO_DATS(UTCTOLOCAL(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'US/Central')).

I need to create a Calculated Column similar to this in Data Flow For Snapshot Date if I use the above expression I am getting the below error:

UTCTOLOCAL function only supports UTC offset timezone formats.

To address this, I updated the expression to use a UTC offset format as follows:

1.TO_DATS(UTCTOLOCAL(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, '-06:00'))

2.TO_DATS(UTCTOLOCAL(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'UTC-6'))

However, this also throws the same error.

Questions:

  1. Does anyone know what UTC offset timezone formats are specifically supported in Data Flows?
  2. Are there any working examples or alternatives to dynamically handle time zones in Data Flows, especially for US/Central time?

Thank you in advance for your guidance and suggestions!

Best regards,
Ganga Reddy Somu

entry.title: How do i calculate the data between the manage systems and Solution Manager
entry.content: How do i calculate the data flow between the Manage systems and Solution Manager, We need to establish how much data is flowing between the manage system(s) and Solution Manager

entry.title: Re: Where-used-list for many objects
entry.content:
Hi All,

Have anyone found the solution to find dependent object i know this is late post but we have one requirement which need to scan multiple custom reports/transaction codes where all they are used.

Can you let me know a pseudo code or any standard code which will help. I have tried RSDEPEND,RS_ABAP_SOURCE_SCAN. These do not solve the purpose

entry.title: Re: Error when uploading Data in the Manage Lookup Table...
entry.content:
Hi Lukas,

for the definition of the lookup table it is not required to include the quantity. This is reflected in the price condition itself already, specifically the 'Range Value' and 'Range UoM or Currency' column. You maintain these columns for price condition types Volume or Tier.
 

Quantity ranges can be used if you have another criteria which is used to identify the price condition itself. For standard pricing scenarios this is probably not required.

The quantity which is applied to the price condition is part of the Calculate Price Element function in the pricing tree. 
In principle the typical pricing logic is: 
a) identify price condition by retrieving a row in a lookup table
b) calculate the price element by applying the quantity on the this price condition. 

Regarding your scenario:
In the predefined content we defined specific price elements for each type of charge (one-time, recurring, usage-based). 
While it is not mandatory to use separate lookup tables for the price definition, the separation into several price element specifications has some benefits:
different labels in the pricing result, different S/4 condition type for the type of charge. And for the sake of simplicity we defined for each price element specification a related lookup table.
Now it seems that you have followed a different path, at least a reuse of the lookup table for all charge types, which is a valid approach as long as the input fields are always the same. 
( Remark: Typically, the basic input for prices is the combination of productCode, marketId and rateElement. In case you want to use customer specific prices this is then extended by the customerId. If you do not use the productCode and marketId - like in your table - then this price condition is determined independant on the product or market, which rarely makes sense. )
In this case, a valid price definition would be:

Best regards,
Carsten

entry.title: Failed to commit objects to server : Undefined Info Store error while creating Users/Groups, logging
entry.content:
We have recently upgraded SAP BO from version SAP 4.3 SP03 Package 500 to the latest version SAP BO 4.3 SP04 Package 800

While everything is working fine in the application after upgrade but there is a certain issue where we are unable to create new user in the application nor we can do any modification in the present user and user group , we have being facing the error pop up as "Failed to commit objects to server : Undefined Info Store error"

We have also tried importing the biar with users

entry.title: Re: SAPAATP supply protection system should not calculate...
entry.content: Thanks for quick response

entry.title: Re: SAP FSM - Best Matching Technician - include 'Travelt...
entry.content:
Hello,

yes, this can be done in custom policies, using our Auto-Scheduling Policy Designer.

Read more here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_FIELD_SERVICE_MANAGEMENT/fsm_ai/custom-policies.html

You can configure things like allowed travel time inside/outside the work time pattern for the first job of the day using the general settings: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_FIELD_SERVICE_MANAGEMENT/fsm_ai/policy-general-settings.html#assignment-generation-options-as-parameter-sets

In addition, there are many rules and objectives that can be used to customize the behavior as required.

For your case, I recommend changing the parameters defining the allowed driving time before/after work time pattern start/end in the rule „Respect resource work time pattern“ to 0, since you don‘t want to allow driving outside WTP.

More info in the docs: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_FIELD_SERVICE_MANAGEMENT/fsm_ai/rules.html?locale=en-US#jobrespectsworktimepattern

Thanks for your interest in our product and happy testing!

Best regards,

Florian Glanzmann, Product Manager Auto-Scheduling at SAP Field Service Management

entry.title: Re: Passing data from one session to another session
entry.content:
Perhaps your current solution with using a Memory ID can be "fixed", if you use standard "enqueue technology" for preventing simultaneous updates by multiple sessions. See the ABAP reference for how to create and use an ENQUEUE-object.

Alternatively, the "ABAP Intermode Communication" might be used to solve your requirement. Unfortunately, I didn't find any documentation for it. Will update here, if I can find something.

entry.title: Visual Studio code fiori application deployment fails with status code 500
entry.content:
Hi, I have a fiori list report that I have created in visual studio code using the fiori generator. I have already connected and configured it to my on-premise (demo21) SAP system. When running "npm run start" the app works as intended. However, when trying to deploy I run "npm run deploy" in which asks me for my credentials, after specifying the credentials I get the following error as seen below:

The target system URL that I have used is from going to transaction SMICM>Go to> Services and is in the form of https://abcdefg.mydomain.com:PortNumber
my ui5.yaml file is as below:

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

and my ui5-deploy.yaml is as follows:

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Running in debug mode produces the same result and I have followed similar steps detailed in Solved: Problems launching first Fiori App - SAP Community Can someone please advise?

You can use this in context of quotation tab

 

Thanks,

Akhilesh

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Rio de Janeiro 2025
entry.content:
Estou super empolgada para participar do SAP Inside Track Rio de Janeiro 2025! Estou começando minha jornada no mundo SAP e esse evento vai ser a oportunidade perfeita para aprender mais sobre as novidades da plataforma e entender como tudo isso pode transformar a forma como as empresas operam.

Vai ser incrível conhecer as principais soluções da SAP, como o SAP S/4HANA, SAP Cloud Platform e outras ferramentas que estão revolucionando o mercado. As palestras e workshops vão ser uma ótima chance para dar aquele start e entender como posso aplicar essas soluções na prática no futuro.

Além disso, vai ser muito legal trocar experiências com outras profissionais e aprender com quem já está mais experiente nesse universo. Estou super animada para descobrir como o SAP pode me ajudar a crescer e explorar novos horizontes na minha carreira.

Se você também está começando ou tem curiosidade sobre o mundo SAP, esse evento é uma excelente oportunidade para dar os primeiros passos. Vamos nos encontrar lá e aprender juntas no SAP Inside Track Rio de Janeiro 2025!

entry.title: Email List - List Tag SAP CPQ
entry.content:
Hi CPQ folks,

I was working on Email lists recently and noticed that whenever we insert the List tag to pull all the emails from a custom table it is not working(Email is not getting triggered when list tag pulls multiple emails). Only working when the list tag is pulling single mail id from the custom table.

When adding the list tag in the email textbox.

The idea is to maintain the emails in a custom table and pull it into email list so that the notifications will be triggered.

Any idea or suggestion would be appreciated.

Thanks,

Akhilesh.

entry.title: SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition & SAP Mobile Start app: selection of language?
entry.content:
Dear experts,

we have a SAP Build Work Zone standard edition page, and when the page is opened on a desktop browser the user can switch between available page languages in their setting:

However when opening the same page in SAP Mobile Start app this setting for language and region seem not to be available. Am I missing something, is it not possible to switch between languages also on a mobile device?

Thank you, Br petra

entry.title: Subscribing SAP Commerce business events in Kyma by executing serverless Functions
entry.content:
Introduction

A subject of this post is to show how to send business events like:

  • customer created
  • password forgotten
  • order created
  • product added to cart

from SAP Commerce to BTP, Kyma Runtime and subscribe to them by executing a serverless Function.

Prerequisites

  • SAP Commerce instance installed
  • SAP BTP global account & subaccount created and Trial Kyma environment enabled  

Integrate SAP Commerce with BTP, Kyma Runtime

1. Add following Kyma-related extensions in localextensions.xml file:

 

<extension name='kymaintegrationbackoffice' />
<extension name='kymaintegrationservices' />

 

2. Build & start a platform.

3. When SAP Commerce is up, go to: System->Update in HAC, select "Update Running System", then select extensions:

  • kymaintegrationbackoffice
  • kymaintegrationservices

and execute the update.

4. In Backoffice, go to: System->API->Destination Targets, select "Default_Template" and execute action: "Register Destination Target"

5. Provide following fields in the registration form:

  • Token URL: [will be available after registering SAP Commerce instance in BTP cockpit]
  • New destination's id: BTP_KYMA_RUNTIME

Register SAP Commerce in BTP cockpit and expose it to BTP, Kyma Runtime

1. Enter the BTP global account and go to: System Landscape->Systems and  select: "Add System". Provide following fields in the form:

  • System Type: select "SAP Commerce Cloud"
  • System Name: local SAP Commerce instance

2. After adding the system, get the required token URL:

3. Paste the token to previous form in SAP Commerce Backoffice and finish the registration:

4. See newly created "BTP_KYMA_RUNTIME" destination target with configuration of API to be exposed and events to be emitted:

5. Expose registered SAP Commerce system to BTP, Kyma Runtime. In BTP Cockpit (global account) go to: System Landscape->Formations and select: "Create Formation". In the form provide:

  • Formation Name: SAP Commerce To Kyma
  • Formation Type: select "Side-by-Side Extensibility with Kyma"
  • Subaccount: select [your_subaccount]

6. In the next step, select registered system: local SAP Commerce instance

7. SAP Commerce system is exposed to Kyma now:

Configure Kyma and check if SAP Commerce is connected in Kyma dashboard

1. Enter BTP cockpit subaccount, select Overview from menu and go to Kyma Environment section. You should already have the Kyma environment enabled (if not, go to the link given in "Prerequisites" paragraph). Enter the Kyma dashboard:

 

2. In "Cluster Details" (main view after selecting the cluster) go to: Configuration->Modules and click "Add".

3. Select following modules and add them:

  • application-connector - to connect with registered SAP Commerce system in BTP
  • eventing - to handle events emmited by SAP Commerce
  • nats - to use NATS server as a backend for eventing
  • serverless - to use serverless Kyma Functions

4. To properly enable the eventing functionality, edit eventing module and set backend type to NATS.

5. Enter "Cluster Details" view and go to Integration->Application and check if you see local SAP Commerce instance connected:

If not, please check if "BTP_KYMA_RUNTIME" destination target has already "Registered" status in Backoffice.

Create serverless Function and Subscription to SAP Commerce event

1. Create a serverless Function that logs the "customer created" event emitted by SAP Commerce after customer registration. Thus, go to Namespaces and select "default". Then go to Workloads->Functions and create the function.

2. Provide following fields in the form:

  • Name - customer-created
  • Source Type: Inline
  • Language: JavaScript
  • Runtime: Node.js 20
  • Source:

 

    module.exports = {
       main: async function (event, context) {
       console.log("Customer created:", event.data);
       return;
       }
   }

 

 3. After creating the function wait until its state is "Running":

4. In the Backoffice, in previously created BTP_KYMA_RUNTIME Destination Target, in Destinations and Event Configurations section there are pre-defined events' ids available, i.a.:

- customer.created.v1 - emitted after customer registration

- order.created.v1 - emitted after placing order

- password.forgotten.v1 - emitted after password forgotten action triggered

- product.addtocart.v1 - emitted after adding product to the cart

We will use customer.created.v1 event in our example.

5. To subscribe the event, create a Subscription resource. In the Kyma dashboard ("default" namespace view) go to Configuration->Subscriptions and create the Subscription. Provide following fields in the form:

  • Name: customer-created-sub
  • Types: customer.created.v1
  • Service: select "customer-created" (name of previously created Function)
  • Sink: [automatically populated after selecting the service]
  • Type matching: Standard
  • Source: select mp-local-sap-commerce-instance (previously connected SAP Commerce instance)

6. All configuration steps are finished when a Subscription has status "Ready".

Register new customer on the storefront to test "customer created" event 

1. Go to storefront and register new user:

2. You should see similar logs about emitting the event to Kyma in the SAP Commerce:

 

INFO [Thread-14] [KymaEventEmitStrategy] Event (EventId : df428555-e4d5-4436-aa21-f9a9994a8854) sending response : <200,{"event-id":"df428555-e4d5-4436-aa21-f9a9994a8854","status":"","reason":""},[content-length:"76", content-type:"application/json", date:"Tue, 21 Jan 2025 15:06:35 GMT", server:"istio-envoy", x-envoy-upstream-service-time:"36"]>

 

3. In Kyma dashboard select "customer-created" Function previously created, go to section Replicas of the Function and select the replica, then go to Containers section and click "View Logs".

You can find following logs with the event payload produced by the function after "customer created" event.

 

Customer created: {
   customerId: '5c2ef4c2-e6a8-4094-bb53-8f08c7dcefe3',
   customerUid: 'jan.kowalski@gmail.com',
   storeUid: 'electronics'
}

 

Conclusion

We used BTP, Kyma Runtime to subscribe business events emitted from SAP Commerce. Created serverless Function that was a subscriber just logged the event payload. Nevertheless, we can use the Function to execute any logic written in node.js or Python, like complex calculations, storing data in external database, calling the API exposed by SAP Commerce or integrating with 3rd party services. Function body itself can be defined in Inline mode (source code added during Function creation)  or fetched from indicated Git repository.

entry.title: Re: SAPAATP supply protection system should not calculate...
entry.content: avl stock 60, Customer-1(High Priority) allocated qty 40,customer-2 (low priority) allocated qty 30, if customer-2 place an order with qty 30 qty, committed qty 30 and 2nd order Customer-1 (High Priority) please order with 40 qty, committed qty 30. Expected result: if customer-2 place an order with qty 30 qty, committed qty 20 and 2nd order Customer-1 (High Priority) please order with 40 qty, committed qty 40. could you please help on this

entry.title: Re: Tips and Tricks Best Practice: Annual Leave Accrual Recalculation based on different leave limit
entry.content:
Hi Neelesh,

 

Thank you for sharing such a wonderful blog; I truly appreciate it! However, I would like to share a small observation. In my opinion, there might not be a need to use the Opposite Sign function since the value will automatically be subtracted when adding multiples.

For instance:

Under variables, we can directly update the balance e.g., 30−35= -5
In the rule block, we can add multiples with calendar days e.g., 366+(−5)=361

Please feel free to let me know if there are any errors in my perspective. Once again, thank you for your insights!

 

Thanks,

Parthu.

entry.title: Re: A warm welcome to our new SAP Champions in January 2025

entry.title: Re: Help! Why Don’t I Get a Notification for My Custom Situation?
entry.content:
Hi @Aditi10 ,

I am happy that the post is helpful for you. I can point you out to a blog post series that discusses the configuration for custom situations with the extended framework. As product owner of Situation Handling I can only support you in generic questions. If you need specific advice for a use case you would need to reach out to procurement experts.

Best
 Angelika

entry.title: Re: Create Supplier along with attahments in S4System from third party system
entry.content: You cannot create them with attachments, but you can supply attachments after the fact with a second API.

entry.title: SAP PI Sheet Timing Issue
entry.content:
Case:1 As we have noticed that in SAP PI SHEET, punching of date & time is 14.01.25 (17:36:29) by Employee ID "X" but when we checked and found in the properties of the digital sign that this entry is being shown from other employee ID "Y" on 15:37:00.

Refer red highlighted entry at Screenshot.

Case:2

In similar way, punching of date & time is 14.01.25 (15:31:33) by Employee ID "X" but when we checked and found in the properties of the digital sign that this entry is being shown from same employee ID "X" which is correct but the incorrect time is showing which is 15:27:30.

How this digital sign time is before the data punching time?

Refer red highlighted entry at Screenshot.

entry.title: Re: Can't preview Crystal Report Layout for A/R correctio...
entry.content:
Hello,

Open the screen "Report and Layout Manager":

Search for "Sales -> AR Invoice" and check if the layout status is "Active" on this field:

entry.title: Re: Intent-based Navigation - semanticObjectAction annotation
entry.content:
Hi @sandeep_rs ,

I don't have local xml annotations. This is a List Report app with no local xml annotations, just CDS view annotations. The quick view automatically shows up with those links. That is my question, why does that quicklink popover shows up, instead of the user being navigated to target mapping specified in the cds annotations?

entry.title: Re: Consume SAP BTP Document Information Extraction service for custom documents in ABAP
entry.content: Or take more than an inspiration from CL_FLOG_DOX_SERVICE_API or CL_SD_SOR_SERVICE. Clean and clear code.

entry.title: How to change the quantity of the product while creating an Invoice
entry.content:
We have 5 quantities in one outbound delivery but we would like to invoice only 3 quantity. is there any option to change the quantity of the product while creating an Invoice? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to change the quantity of the product while creat...
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

 

Its not possible to modify the quantity in the invoice document, since this is fetched from the outbound delivery. 

 

Thanks & Regards, 

Arjun T H 

SAP Product Support

entry.title: Re: OSE + table + selection type: single + left click => no onSelect

entry.title: Re: Incompleteness check ship-to party (address) in VA01

@Ryan-Crosby masterdata is complete, yes. Thats all good. 

But the order was created by interface with an empty address, but with account - as standard does with a 9.... address code number.

entry.title: Can't update KF in Planning Level but can in MDW
entry.content:
I have a key figure that, when at a given planning level, can be updated in a planning view (or via the master data workbook). When I add BBCURRENCY to the planning level (and update the KF to that planning level), the key figure can only be updated in the MDW. If I try to update it in the planning view it throws an error with no real description, just a very long alphanumeric.

Any ideas why this may be happening?

entry.title: Re: Error when uploading Data in the Manage Lookup Table...

My question to your last comment is, what do i have to do, so that i dont need to input values for the quantity columnes. Because if i fill them i get the error i wrote in my last comment and if i dont put anything in it, i get the error from my original post ?

entry.title: Re: Food for thought: What’s your favorite holiday dish?
entry.content:
Well, all these pictures and stories of great food are making me hungry - and I just had breakfast.  🙂

While nobody would call me a good cook, I am addicted to the Great British Bake Off and can even re-watch - even though I know I would never attempt a Battenburg cake or anything like that.   

So I'll live vicariously through your stories and pictures - thank you!

Keep on cooking!

Sue

entry.title: Re: Mobile Services in BTP shows no org or space exists.
entry.content: Same error but clearing the cache didn't work for me. Thanks for the help

entry.title: SAP Ariba 2502 Release Key Innovations Preview
entry.content:
Hello SAP Ariba Community! We are thrilled to present the latest features and enhancements from our 2502 release, focused on streamlining procurement processes, enhancing configuration flexibility, and boosting compliance. Let's delve deeper into the key innovations transforming your procurement and sourcing landscape:

Intelligent Configuration Manager Enhancements

Feature Toggle Management (PLICM-4237) Administrators now have the autonomy to manage select feature toggles directly, streamlining the process without needing to rely on SAP. This allows for a more agile testing and deployment cycle, promoting smoother transitions from test to production environments.

Feature Toggle Management

Configuration Bundles Creation (PLICM-4464) Simplify migration by packaging and deploying configuration settings across different sites. This reduces manual setup time, facilitates consistency across sites, and supports rapid scaling of configurations.

Configuration Bundles Creation

 

 

Site Configuration Migration (PLICM-4465) Administrators can migrate numerous configuration settings from one site to another seamlessly. This self-service migration enhances operational efficiency and reduces dependency on external assistance for site configuration changes.Site Configuration Migration

 

 

Together, these innovations provide a comprehensive set of functional enhancements to make managing your SAP Ariba landscape simpler and more efficient.

Highlights from Procure-to-Order

Revamped Item Details Page (GB-24673) The item details page has been redesigned for a superior user experience, featuring advanced pricing information, multiple item images, and expanded supplier insights. A new section now gives insights into supplier diversity and risk attributes, aligning with your sustainability goals.

Revamped Item Details Page

 Spend Consumption Reports (CP-29451)  Access to Spend Consumption reports provides comprehensive tracking of PO and Non-PO spends, allowing organizations to enhance compliance and optimize spend management. These reports can be customized to fit billing cycles, offering flexibility and deeper insights.

Price Validation on Import (CP-29879) Ensure accuracy with automated price validation checks for requisition imports. The feature streamlines processing by flagging price discrepancies immediately, promoting efficient requisition handling and compliance with budget standards.

For further details on these innovations, take a look at our SAP Ariba Procure to Order 2502 Release Key Innovations

Highlights from Source to Contract

Travel & Expense dashboard, presenting information from Concur (ARBTS-56) The newly introduced Travel & Expense Dashboard integrates seamlessly with SAP Concur, offering detailed insights and reporting on expense types and payment status across multiple currencies. This allows for informed decision-making and spend optimization in global contexts.

Travel and Expense Dashboard

 

 


AI-Assisted Category Strategy (CATMAN-467) Leverage AI to generate strategic category recommendations, efficiently digitizing and analyzing category data and market dynamics. This supports effective strategy formulation and alignment with business objectives.

AI-Assisted Category Strategy

 

 

Supplier Preferencing Matrix (ARBCAT-726) A strategic tool for evaluating supplier relationships based on business value, aiding in better engagement, negotiation, and partnership opportunities, which ultimately bolsters procurement performance.

Supplier Preferencing Matrix

 

 

Operational Reporting APIs for SAP Ariba Category Management (CATMAN-468) Harness the power of APIs to access operational data from SAP Ariba Category Management, supporting robust data analysis through third-party tools to drive informed decision-making.

Support for Large-Capacity Events in Guided Sourcing (SS-58288) large-capacity RFP events allows you to manage complex sourcing workflows involving thousands of line items and hundreds of suppliers, thereby improving the scalability and reach of your sourcing initiatives.

For further details on these innovations and more, take a look at our SAP Ariba Source to Contract 2502 Release Key Innovations

Highlights from Central Invoice Management

Automatic Reprocessing of Invoices (CIM-657) Automate invoice reprocessing for missing receipts, providing better visibility and reducing the necessity for manual interventions, thus increasing efficiency.

Automatic Reprocessing of Invoices with Missing Receipts

 

Data Center US10 Deployment (CIM-1918) Establish a hosting presence in the United States for a broader range of options in managing access to SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management, offering flexibility aligned with business needs.

Peppol Network Integration (CIM-1159, CIM-212 - CIM-1150) Enable invoice receipt through the Peppol network for several countries, including New Zealand, Australia, Finland, Belgium, and Luxembourg, enhancing international invoicing capabilities.

XML File Processing with API (CIM-1816)  Support XML files in Supplier Invoices and Document Extraction API, improving data extraction from invoices for streamlined processing and increased accuracy, including support for electronic invoices like Germany's XRechnung.

 

Enhanced Approval Workflow Conditions (CIM-1585) Introduce new conditions for approval workflows, adding flexibility in handling invoices based on Purchase Orders and other criteria to align closely with business processes.

Parallel Workflow Support (CIM-1711) Support parallel workflows for supplier invoices, enabling simultaneous approval and information requests, which enhances workflow efficiency and reliability.

Document Information Extraction Templates (CIM-1942) Utilize templates to improve data field extraction from invoices, ensuring enhanced accuracy and reducing manual entry errors.

Use Document Information Extraction Templates

 

New India Data Center Support (CES-1088)

Localized Connectivity: New SAP Ariba customers in India can connect to the latest India data center, offering improved performance and optimized data localization for enhanced regulatory compliance. Note that existing customers cannot migrate their data to the new data center.

These innovations aim to significantly enhance your procurement and sourcing capabilities, leading to improved efficiency, data-driven insights, and strengthened supplier relationships.

Stay connected with our community for more insights and updates:

Register for the Early Release Series for 2502 release

  • Resources:
    • Feature related materials
      • SAP Ariba Connect - Release Readiness (Customers except CIM)
      • Readiness Community page (For CIM customers)
    • SAP Community for Intelligent Spend Management page
    • SAP Help Portal pages - Procurement and Network
    • What’s New
    • SAP Products and Services YouTube channel - https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLWV533hWWvDk7zRbhOsWQkF5BGWokhHYH
    • "Spend Management and Business Network" playlist - https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLWV533hWWvDk7zRbhOsWQkF5BGWokhHYH&si=zTlYobcledkWNQ

Make sure to check out our other blogs and subscribe to all of our authors to keep up to date with the latest and greatest innovations!

entry.title: issue with java script action in Build apps
entry.content:
Hi all, 
i'm sending image to SAP Documentation information extraction service and Getting the extraction Payload as in the Code below. also specified the code i'm using to filter the payload to get the desired output.
Desired Output : 

 

 

{ 
  deliveryNote: '2006452328',
  lineItems: [
    { 
       Material: '121G0612',
       OrderQty: '2',
       Unit: 'PC',
       CustomerOrderNo: null
     }
  ]
}

 

function extractLineItemValues(input) {
    const output = {
        deliveryNote: null,
        lineItems: [],
    };
 
    // Extract Delivery Note details
    if (input.extraction && input.extraction.headerFields) {
        const deliveryNoteField = input.extraction.headerFields.find(
            (field) => field.name === "Delivery.Note.no"
        );
 
        if (deliveryNoteField) {
            output.deliveryNote = deliveryNoteField.value || null;
        }
    }
 
    // Extract Line Item details
    if (input.extraction && input.extraction.lineItems) {
        input.extraction.lineItems.forEach((lineItem, index) => {
            const lineItemDetails = {
                // lineItemIndex: index + 1,
                Material: null,
                OrderQty: null,
                Unit: null,
                CustomerOrderNo: null,
            };
 
            lineItem.forEach((field) => {
                if (field.name === "Material.Number") {
                    lineItemDetails.Material = field.value;
                } else if (field.name === "Order.Qty") {
                    lineItemDetails.OrderQty = field.value;
                } else if (field.name === "Unit") {
                    lineItemDetails.Unit = field.value;
                } else if (field.name === "Customer.Order.No") {
                    lineItemDetails.CustomerOrderNo = field.value;
                }
            });
 
            output.lineItems.push(lineItemDetails);
        });
    }
 
    return output;
}
 const input = 
   {
    "status": "DONE",
    "id": "bc4a788f-f484-41c6-9080-b542af6eceac",
    "fileName": "20240229_002955623_iOS.jpg",
    "documentType": "custom",
    "created": "2025-01-22T11:35:20.521251+00:00",
    "finished": "2025-01-22T11:35:27.302215+00:00",
    "clientId": "default",
    "languageCodes": [
        "en"
    ],
    "pageCount": 1,
    "schemaId": "8a708f91-c059-4668-b32e-6a983617a479",
    "schemaVersion": "1",
    "schemaName": "Danfoss",
    "width": 2213,
    "height": 2951,
    "country": null,
    "bocrVersion": "2.38.0",
    "doxVersion": "1.105.2",
    "fileType": "jpeg",
    "dataForRetrainingStatus": "notUsedForTraining",
    "extraction": {
        "headerFields": [
            {
                "name": "Delivery.Note.no",
                "category": "custom",
                "value": "2006452328",
                "rawValue": "2006452328",
                "type": "string",
                "page": 1,
                "confidence": 0.7454677150958504,
                "coordinates": {
                    "x": 0.21554450971531858,
                    "y": 0.34700101660454086,
                    "w": 0.09489380930863084,
                    "h": 0.0155879362927821
                },
                "model": "ai",
                "label": "Delivery.Note.no",
                "description": "\t\nDelivery Note Number"
            },
            {
                "name": "Cust.order.no",
                "category": "custom",
                "value": "4508421585",
                "rawValue": "4508421585",
                "type": "string",
                "page": 1,
                "confidence": 0.7423638309141645,
                "coordinates": {
                    "x": 0.49796656122910077,
                    "y": 0.41782446628261605,
                    "w": 0.0655219159511975,
                    "h": 0.010504913588614051
                },
                "model": "ai",
                "label": "Cust.order.no",
                "description": "Customer Order Number"
            }
        ],
        "lineItems": [
            [
                {
                    "name": "Material.Number",
                    "category": "custom",
                    "value": "121G0612",
                    "rawValue": "121G0612",
                    "type": "string",
                    "page": 1,
                    "confidence": 0.7516425639717169,
                    "coordinates": {
                        "x": 0.22413014008133755,
                        "y": 0.7095899695018638,
                        "w": 0.07681879801174876,
                        "h": 0.0155879362927821
                    },
                    "model": "ai",
                    "label": "Material.Number",
                    "description": "Material Number"
                },
                {
                    "name": "Order.Qty",
                    "category": "custom",
                    "value": "2",
                    "rawValue": "2",
                    "type": "string",
                    "page": 1,
                    "confidence": 0.7661332977672575,
                    "coordinates": {
                        "x": 0.1482150926344329,
                        "y": 0.7109454422229753,
                        "w": 0.007681879801174879,
                        "h": 0.014910199932226309
                    },
                    "model": "ai",
                    "label": "Order.Qty",
                    "description": "Order Quantity"
                },
                {
                    "name": "Unit",
                    "category": "custom",
                    "value": "PC",
                    "rawValue": "PC",
                    "type": "string",
                    "page": 1,
                    "confidence": 0.7803107131481841,
                    "coordinates": {
                        "x": 0.1789426118391324,
                        "y": 0.7106065740426973,
                        "w": 0.023497514685946685,
                        "h": 0.01491019993222642
                    },
                    "model": "ai",
                    "label": "Unit",
                    "description": "Unit of Measure"
                }
            ]
        ]
    }
}
 
// Example usa
const formattedOutput = extractLineItemValues(input);
// irpa_core.cor.log("")
console.log(formattedOutput);

  The issue is , its working in the VSCODE and GB Compiler , but its not working in the JS workflow action Component in SAP Build apps
@Dan_Wroblewski  @DonWilliams @Sandra_Rossi @Ulrich_Schmidt 
Many thanks in Advance.

entry.title: Bundle custom webservice messages
entry.content:
Dear all,

we have created a synchronous custom soa enterprise webservice as a consumer proxy in our SAP S/4HANA system. Using an ABAP Programme/Report we are mass selecting Business Partners and are sending them via an AIF interface and the custom soa enterprise webservice to a legacy sanctioned party list check application/system. We do not have any SAP PI middleware available between SAP S/4 and the legacy sanctioned party list check application/system. The legacy sanctioned party list check application/system checks the Business Partners and is returning a synchronous check result message to S/4. In S/4 the ABAP Programme/Report is processing the returned check result and is taking certain action on the Business Partner data depending on the check results. The message log is displayed in the ABAP Programme/Report. Also the AIF error monitor "/n/aif/err" can be used to monitor all send and received messages. 

Currently we are facing the issue that when the ABAP Programme/Report is mass run always a very small number of BPs can not be processed over the webservice. The error message displayed in the AIF error monitor is "SOAP:1023 SRT: Processing error in Internet Commun ication Framework: ("Direct connect to ws-gateway- cert.b2x.vwg:443 failed: N)".

We currently believe this error is happening because we are sending all Business Partner messages one by one over the webservice interface and at some point the legacy sanctioned party list check application/system can not handle the load anymore.

As a solution we currently would like to bundle/package the Business Partner messages to impose less load on the target legacy sanctioned party list check application/system.

What is the best way to implement a message bundling/message packaging in our situation?

1. According to this SAP Community post "Solved: Sender Proxy to send multiple messages - SAP Community" we could bundle in our ABAP programme before the messages are passed to AIF and the webservice is called? Is this correct?

"This scenario can be handled at abap end.

Decide the number of records you want to send in one file. In abap when the number of records reached then call the abap proxy method. For the remaining records again call the abap proxy method so while going to XI it will pass only the number of records desired by you."

2. This article (Runtime Configuration Options in SAP AIF – INT4) is suggesting that the bundling/message packaging can be done in the SAP AIF runtime configuration? Is this correct?

 

Thanks in advance.

Regards,

Selho

entry.title: Order block issue
entry.content: In ECC respective order types orders are getting blocked over and over again even though its been released from credit perspective. There is a background job that is being ran by the system it might be related to the risk category that is set for the customer how to resolved the issue

entry.title: acquisition value is blank for book 89 though it is posted. could some one clarify why?
entry.content: acquisition value is blank for book 89 though it is posted. assume that it could be because of useful life which is 0. could someone clarify?

entry.title: Re: Create Supplier along with attahments in S4System fro...
entry.content: Hi Kiran, I thought you were referring to MDG to S4, for third party system i don't have exact details..will need check

entry.title: Replicate same source object with different target name within the same space in Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a source CDS view within my S4HANA on Prem system (I_GLACCOUNTLINEITEMRAWDATA) with data from 2021 onwards. The amount of data in the table is huge. I want to replicate the view into Google Cloud Storage files and then load the files into Google Big Query. Since the volume is huge, I want to split the replication flows into smaller flows by giving the FiscalYear filter. I created a replication flow (Job_2021), gave I_GLACCOUNTLINEITEMRAWDATA as source, created a filter on FiscalYear 2021 and renamed the default target object, I_GLACCOUNTLINEITEMRAWDATA to I_GLACCOUNTLINEITEMRAWDATA_2021. I saved the job and deployed. It went through successfully. After that, I wanted to create the next job, Job_2022 with same source, filter as 2022 and renamed the target object within the flow as I_GLACCOUNTLINEITEMRAWDATA_2022. When I am trying to deploy it, I am getting an error saying that the object I_GLACCOUNTLINEITEMRAWDATA exists in another space. Is there a solution to this? I simply want to split the source data into multiple tables/files in target.

entry.title: Check used capacity of every custom field
entry.content:
Dear experts, 

firstly, I would like to ask about the capacity that particular custom field use. I know, that business context has certain capacity and that by creating a custom field in it, it will consume some capacity, but I would like to know the exact percentage of the capacity that every custom field takes.
Is it possible to check it somewhere? In the app Extensibility cockpit I can see only the percentage of used capacity, but that is it, and it is not enough for us. 

My second question is about lowering the number of characters of custom field. 
From my experience it is not possible, as there will be error message saying that I cannot decrease the value. BUT, is there any other way how to do it instead of deleting the field and creating the new one? From my understanding deleting the field that is already used will also delete data inside, which can be dangerous in production. 

Thank you very much for your help. 
Veronika
